title: Us Corn Exports In 2025 A Banner Year Amid Shifting Trade Dynamics

section_path_text: Us Corn Exports In 2025 A Banner Year Amid Shifting Trade Dynamics
summary: corn exports are on track to reach historic highs, supported by a convergence of favorable agricultural, economic, and geopolitical factors. Yet, while volume prospects look strong, the geographical spread of export destinations-and the policies shaping those flows-will critically determine the impact on maritime freight demand, particularly in terms of tonne-days.
